title: Remove erroneous projectsData import from content model
description: data/imported/projectsData.js was imported by mistake and should not be part of the public data contract or content-model validation. Remove it from expected imported files, docs, validation scripts, committed imported tree, and PM notes.
design: Keep research/project information sourced from cv-jr.yaml for now. Do not validate or import projectsData.js in vz-static-site.
notes:
Removed erroneous projectsData.js import from the public model. Deleted data/imported/projectsData.js from the committed imported tree, removed it from scripts/check-imported-data.mjs expected files, removed project-card validation from scripts/validate-content-model.ts, removed projectSchema/projectsSchema exports from src/data/content-model.ts, and updated docs/handoff. Verification: npm run data:check:strict passed; npm run content:check passed and no longer reports projects; npm run ci passed with 0 Astro errors/warnings/hints; git diff --check passed.
CI diagnosis: GitHub Actions failed on commit 6885156 because astro check type-checked scripts/validate-content-model.ts without Node type definitions, producing errors for node:fs/promises, node:path, process, and implicit any in readdir filters. Added @types/node pinned to the Node 22 major used by .node-version/CI. Local npm run ci passes after the fix.
close_reason: Removed projectsData.js from the imported data contract and content-model validation because it was an erroneous private export artifact.

title: Simplify public data pipeline to consume imported sanitized files
description: The private repo already owns sanitization and writes sanitized outputs to data/imported/. Remove the second public allowlist/sanitizer from vz-site2 and replace it with a structural validator for the imported file tree documented in ../vz-personal-store/pm/website/handoff-vz-static-site.md.
design: Public repo no longer re-sanitizes private data. The private repo export-public script owns allowlist/redaction and writes data/imported/. This repo runs data:check to validate the imported tree shape and parseability, with an explicit --require-imported option for strict checks after export.
notes: Correction applied: removed the duplicate public allowlist/sanitizer from vz-site2 and deleted the public fixture/generated output. The public repo now only validates the imported sanitized tree contract from data/imported/: expected files/directories, non-empty required files, and JSON parseability. It does not maintain field allowlists, private deny strings, or redaction rules; those remain in ../vz-personal-store/pm/website/export-allowlist.yaml. Verification: rg found no stale references to public-data.allowlist, sync-public-data, data:sync, or src/data/generated; npm run data:check passed with the expected missing-export warning; npm run data:check:strict failed as expected because data/imported is absent; git diff --check passed; npm run ci passed.
close_reason: Removed duplicate public sanitization from vz-site2. Public repo now consumes data/imported/ as the private repo handoff and only validates structure/basic parseability per ADR 003.

title: Add temporary GitHub Pages project deploy
description: Add a GitHub Pages deployment path for testing the Astro build at https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ before the later custom-domain preview deploy. Keep local development rooted at / and make the Pages base path configurable only for the deploy build.
design: Use SITE_URL and SITE_BASE env vars in astro.config.mjs. Local default remains /; Pages test build sets SITE_URL=https://vzaccaria.github.io and SITE_BASE=/vz-static-site. Deploy dist with GitHub Pages actions.
notes: Final verification: GitHub Pages API reports html_url=https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/, cname=null, https_enforced=true. curl -I -L https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ returns HTTP 200 from GitHub Pages. www.vittoriozaccaria.net still returns HTTP 200 from Vercel. Decision recorded in pm/adr/002-github-pages-project-preview-routing.md.
close_reason: Temporary GitHub Pages project deploy is working at https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ and routing decision is documented in ADR 002.

title: Repair beads issue prefix mismatch
description: bd config reports issue_prefix = vz-static-site, while existing project issues use explicit IDs like vz-site0 and vz-site1. A normal bd create failed with a prefix mismatch during vz-site1. Decide whether to migrate IDs/config or document an explicit --id convention so future issue intake does not require --force.
notes: Discovered when bd create --parent vz-site attempted to create vz-site.1 against database prefix vz-static-site-.

title: Cutover produzione
description: Preparare e svolgere lo switch finale verso www.vittoriozaccaria.net. Criteri: DNS finale documentato, rollback documentato, produzione verificata, vecchio sito Next dichiarato dismesso o parcheggiato.

title: Parity check con sito attuale
description: Confrontare il nuovo sito con l'inventario esistente. Criteri: route principali confrontate con website/docs/audit.md della repo privata, link checker, smoke test su viste chiave, differenze accettate documentate.

title: Preview deploy
description: Configurare deploy automatico del sito di sviluppo. Criteri: preview raggiungibile su preview.vittoriozaccaria.net o URL equivalente, deploy su push alla branch principale, smoke test post-deploy documentato.

title: Feed sitemap SEO e asset
description: Generare feed, sitemap, canonical URL, metadata OpenGraph e asset statici. Criteri: feed.xml valido, sitemap.xml valido, preview/prod site URL configurabili, asset referenziati con path statici corretti.

title: Blog, tag e compatibilita URL
description: Implementare blog statico, pagina elenco, pagine post, tag index e tag detail. Criteri: Markdown/MDX renderizzato staticamente, tag e paginazione se necessaria, compatibilità URL con il sito attuale dove possibile.

title: Viste statiche core
description: Implementare le viste statiche principali: home, bio/research, courses e theses. Criteri: route generate staticamente, dati presi dal content model pubblico, layout responsive, nessuna dipendenza da API o server runtime.

title: Content model e validazione
description: Definire schemi e convenzioni per CV pubblico, blog/frontmatter, publications, courses e theses. Criteri: validazione in build/CI, fallimento esplicito su campi mancanti o non previsti, struttura contenuti stabile.
notes: Implemented content model validation on top of the sanitized data/imported export. Added src/data/content-model.ts with strict Zod schemas for public CV, teaching courses, bibliography records, theses, project cards, blog frontmatter, author frontmatter, and required markdown bodies. Added scripts/validate-content-model.ts and npm run content:check. Astro content collections now read data/imported/blog and data/imported/authors. npm run check now requires data:check:strict, content:check, and astro check. Committed sanitized imported tree is 22 files / 616K; .gitattributes preserves generated whitespace for data/imported while allowing git diff --check to pass. Verification: npm run content:check validates public CV, 112 bibliography records, 3 theses, 2 projects, 2 authors, and 10 blog posts; npm run ci passes with 0 Astro errors/warnings/hints; git diff --cached --check passes.
close_reason: Added strict imported content model validation, Astro blog/author collections from data/imported, and CI enforcement for the sanitized public data tree.

title: Pipeline dati pubblici sanitizzati
description: Definire e implementare la pipeline che importa dati dalla repo privata senza leak. Criteri: allowlist esplicita dei campi esportati, output pubblico validabile, comando documentato per sync periodico, nessun dato privato copiato per default.
design: Allowlist-first JSON pipeline. data/public-data.allowlist.json defines public fields; scripts/sync-public-data.mjs copies only those fields from an explicit --source; src/data/generated/public-data.json is the committed public artifact; npm run data:check validates allowlist compliance and is part of npm run check/CI. ADR 003 records the decision.
notes: Verified: npm run data:sync:example; npm run data:check; npm run data:sync -- --source data/private-export.example.json --dry-run; npm run ci; git diff --check. Also verified npm run data:sync without --source fails intentionally to avoid default private imports.
close_reason: Allowlisted public data pipeline, generated output validation, documented sync command, and no-default-private-import behavior are implemented and verified.

title: Scaffold Astro e toolchain locale
description: Creare lo scaffold del sito statico con Astro. Criteri: npm run dev/build/preview/check funzionano, struttura src/content/data impostata, nessun runtime server richiesto, CI build-only pronta per PR/push.
design: Astro 6 static scaffold with npm scripts, strict tsconfig, src/content blog collection placeholder, src/data metadata/navigation, BaseLayout, index/404 pages, static favicon, and GitHub Actions CI using npm ci + check + build.
notes: Verified: npm ci; npm run check; npm run build; npm run ci; npm run dev served http://127.0.0.1:4321/; npm run preview served http://127.0.0.1:4322/. Astro telemetry is disabled in npm scripts to avoid writing outside the repo during agent/sandbox runs.
close_reason: Astro/npm scaffold, content/data structure, CI workflow, and required dev/build/preview/check commands are implemented and verified.

title: Decisione architetturale e setup ambienti
description: Formalizzare la scelta: repo pubblica separata vz-static-site, SSG statico, preview su dominio dedicato, produzione su vittoriozaccaria.net e Dynadot come registrar/DNS. Artefatti: ADR iniziale, ambienti local/preview/prod documentati, DNS atteso.
design: Accepted ADR 001: Astro static site in a separate public repository, GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages, preview custom domain first, production custom domain www.vittoriozaccaria.net at cutover, Dynadot DNS records documented.
close_reason: ADR 001 documents the accepted static-site architecture, local/preview/production environment contract, and expected Dynadot/GitHub Pages DNS records.

title: Nuovo sito statico pubblico
description: Ricostruire il sito personale come SSG fully static in una repo pubblica separata, con sviluppo locale semplice, preview su dominio dedicato, deploy finale su vittoriozaccaria.net, e pipeline sicura per importare solo dati pubblici dalle sorgenti private.

title: Track @astrojs/check YAML audit advisory
description: npm audit reports a moderate dev-only advisory through @astrojs/check -> @astrojs/language-server -> yaml-language-server -> yaml. npm audit --omit=dev reports 0 vulnerabilities, and npm audit fix --force would downgrade @astrojs/check, so keep the current scaffold working and revisit when upstream publishes a non-breaking fix.
notes: Created during vz-site1 because npm audit has no non-breaking fix for the dev-only @astrojs/check chain.
